description.unified: Deals ??? Magic Damage to enemies within range and roots them for [6 sec->3.5 sec].
Targets 1 enemy and deals ??? Magic Damage to enemies in a line, blinding them for [6 sec->3.5 sec].
On hit, deals ??? additional Magic Damage to the target, and this skill gains [(added) an extra 1000 Magic Defense Penetration]. [(removed) ignores target's M.DEF]

dark.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to blind the target for [5 sec->3 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1 orb->1000], and damage dealt is increased by 100%.

dark.unified: On Normal Attack, has a 10% chance to use the [Dark Barrage] skill.

description.unified: [Shadow Wave] Increases DMG by 50% and the duration of Blind by {0} sec.

Summons the soul of Tears of the Moon, Nerius, dealing ??? M.DMG to frontal enemies and inflicting [Curse of the Moon] for 10sec, and increases own Crit DMG by [50%->70%]. [Curse of the Moon]: Increases M.DMG taken by [25%->12%] and reduces Heal Rate by [25%->12%].
